title: KYC Verification — New Investor Onboarding
description: New investor Arjun Krishnamurthy (PAN: AAKPK7821F) has submitted KYC documents for account opening with initial SIP of ₹25,000/month in Ascend Bluechip Fund.
aiProposal: Approve KYC — all identity documents verified, PAN linked to Aadhaar, CKYC record found, AML score 0.12 (low risk).
rationale: PAN verified against income tax database. Aadhaar linked and OTP verified. CKYC registry shows clean record. AML check via FinScan returned no matches. Address proof matches CKYC record. Risk profile: Conservative. Proposed investment aligns with risk profile.

title: SIP Mandate Modification — Ascend Midcap Fund
description: Existing investor Meera Subramaniam has requested increase in SIP amount from ₹10,000 to ₹25,000/month for Ascend Midcap Fund, effective next cycle.
aiProposal: Approve SIP modification — investor has been active for 3+ years, no missed SIPs, bank mandate limit sufficient.
rationale: Investor has 38-month SIP history with zero debit failures. Bank account mandate limit is ₹50,000/month (sufficient). New amount aligns with stated financial goal (retirement corpus). No complaints on file. KYC status: current.

title: SEBI Monthly Portfolio Disclosure — June 2026
description: AI has drafted the mandatory SEBI monthly portfolio disclosure for June 2026, covering all 12 schemes across equity, debt, and hybrid categories.
aiProposal: Draft ready for review — all 12 scheme portfolios compiled, reconciliation passed, format validated against SEBI circular SEBI/HO/IMD/2024-12.
rationale: Data sourced from SS&C Geneva (as of June 14 EOD). Reconciliation against custodian records: all 12 schemes balanced. Format validated against SEBI/HO/IMD/2024-12. Previous month submission benchmark shows no material deviation. Ready for Compliance Officer sign-off.

title: Knowledge Pattern Update — Redemption Query Resolution
description: Servicing Memory has identified a new high-confidence pattern for resolving T+3 redemption status queries that reduces avg response time from 4.2h to 0.8h.
aiProposal: Accept pattern update — validated against 847 historical cases, precision 94.3%, recall 91.2%. Recommend deployment to production memory store.
rationale: Pattern discovered from 847 resolved redemption queries in the last 30 days. Backtested: precision 94.3%, recall 91.2%, F1 0.928. No bias detected across investor segment cohorts. Shadow mode test: 23 cases, 22 correct resolutions.

title: AML Flag — High-Risk Jurisdiction Declaration
description: New investor Ravi Chandrasekar has declared funds from UAE (FATF grey-list country). AML system flagged for enhanced due diligence before account approval.
aiProposal: Hold for Enhanced Due Diligence — funds origin from FATF grey-list jurisdiction requires additional documentation before onboarding can proceed.
rationale: Investor declared income source as UAE-based business. UAE is on FATF grey list as of Feb 2024. PMLA compliance requires Enhanced Due Diligence per SEBI circular. Recommend: Request source-of-funds certificate, CA certificate, and bank statement for 12 months. Do not onboard until cleared.

title: Account Statement Dispatch — Q1 FY2026
description: Investor Sunita Agarwal requested consolidated Q1 FY2026 account statement across 4 funds. AI compiled and dispatched via registered email.
aiProposal: Dispatch statement — compiled 4-fund consolidated report, format validated, PII masked per DPDP Act.
rationale: Standard statement dispatch. All 4 fund holdings verified. Statement compiled using approved template. PII handling compliant with DPDP Act 2023. Sent to registered email: s****@gmail.com. Delivery confirmation pending.

title: AMFI Monthly MFIN Data Submission — May 2026
description: Monthly industry data submission to AMFI for May 2026. AI drafted report including AUM, folio counts, SIP flows across all schemes.
aiProposal: Submit MFIN data — all fields validated, AUM cross-checked with custodian, SIP flows reconciled.
rationale: All 47 data fields populated. AUM figures cross-verified with custodian statement. SIP flow numbers reconciled with RTGS records. Previous 3 submissions had zero rejection rate from AMFI portal.

title: Knowledge Base Update — SIP Cancellation Patterns
description: Memory system identified new pattern for SIP cancellation requests with 96.1% accuracy, enabling auto-resolution of low-complexity cases.
aiProposal: Approve pattern update — validated and ready for production. Estimated impact: 340 cases/month auto-resolved.
rationale: Pattern trained on 1,240 SIP cancellation cases from Jan–May 2026. Precision 96.1%, recall 93.4%. Conservative deployment: only cases where confidence > 0.95 are auto-resolved. Monthly impact estimate: 340 cases, saving ~142 ops hours.

title: PAN Verification — Existing Investor Re-KYC
description: Existing investor Deepa Iyer is due for Re-KYC per SEBI mandate. PAN and Aadhaar re-verification completed successfully.
aiProposal: Approve Re-KYC — PAN verified, Aadhaar linked, no adverse records found. Account remains active.
rationale: Re-KYC triggered as per SEBI circular on periodic KYC refresh. PAN re-verified with IT database. Aadhaar seed updated. No adverse entries in CIBIL or CKYC. Account in good standing for 7 years.

title: SIP Cancellation — Ascend Flexi Cap Fund
description: Investor Karthik Venkataraman requested cancellation of ₹15,000/month SIP in Ascend Flexi Cap Fund. Reason: change in financial planning.
aiProposal: Process cancellation — investor has 18-month clean history. Cancellation effective next business day. Units remain invested.
rationale: Standard SIP cancellation request. Investor provided written request via email. SIP active for 18 months. Cancellation does not affect existing holdings. No redemption involved. ECS instruction cancelled.

title: SEBI Investor Complaint Response — Draft
description: SEBI SCORES portal complaint #SCORES-2026-4821 received. AI drafted response for Compliance Officer review. Complaint: Delay in redemption payout.
aiProposal: Submit drafted response — acknowledges 2-day delay due to technical issue, commits to remediation payment of ₹842.
rationale: Complaint is about delayed redemption payout. AI analysis: delay was T+5 instead of T+3. Root cause identified as NEFT batch processing error on June 8. Proposed response: acknowledge delay, process ₹842 compensation, commit to T+3 compliance. Low confidence due to unusual compensation calculation method.
overrideReason: Compensation calculation method does not align with SEBI circular on interest computation. Need legal team review before submitting. Rejected for rework.

title: Model Anomaly — Unexpected Confidence Distribution Shift
description: Memory layer detected a 14% drop in average confidence scores across onboarding decisions in the last 24 hours. Potential model drift or data quality issue.
aiProposal: Escalate to ML Ops team — confidence shift detected. Possible causes: upstream data quality degradation, feature distribution shift, or model drift.
rationale: Baseline confidence for onboarding decisions: 0.91 (30-day avg). Current 24-hour avg: 0.78. Delta: -0.13 (14% drop). Triggered alert threshold of -10%. Possible root causes: (1) CKYC API returning partial data, (2) new investor demographics from digital acquisition channel, (3) model drift. Requires ML Ops investigation.
overrideReason: Escalated to ML Ops team (Slack #ml-ops-alerts). Watching closely. No action needed from AI system until root cause confirmed.

title: Suspicious Onboarding Pattern — Structuring Alert
description: New investor Farhan Siddiqui's onboarding profile shows characteristics consistent with structuring (multiple small investments across entities). Referred to AML team.
aiProposal: Escalate to AML Team — multiple high-risk indicators detected. Do not onboard without AML clearance.
rationale: Risk score: 0.84 (high). Pattern matches known structuring typology: 3 joint accounts with same contact number, investment amounts just below ₹50,000 threshold, 2 nominee changes in 30 days. Referred to AML investigation team per PMLA 2002 Section 12A. STR filing may be required.
overrideReason: Escalated to AML Investigation team and Risk Head. Account frozen pending investigation. Compliance Officer notified per PMLA protocol.

title: Redemption Request — Partial Units Ascend Liquid Fund
description: Investor Preethi Rajendran has submitted a partial redemption request for 1,250 units (approx. ₹1.89 L) from Ascend Liquid Fund.
aiProposal: Process redemption — investor has sufficient units, no lien, T+1 settlement for liquid fund, NEFT payout to registered bank.
rationale: Unit balance: 4,820 units (sufficient). No lien or pledge on units. Redemption amount within daily limit. Liquid fund: T+1 settlement. Bank account registered and IFSC verified. SEBI cut-off time: 2PM (request received: 10:32AM).

title: AMFI Disclosure — Portfolio Overlap Report Q1 FY27
description: Mandatory quarterly portfolio overlap report for AMFI. AI has compiled overlap analysis across all equity schemes. Submission deadline: June 16, 2026.
aiProposal: Review and approve — 4 scheme pairs show >60% overlap requiring disclosure per AMFI Best Practices Circular.
rationale: Portfolio overlap analysis complete. 4 pairs of equity schemes show >60% overlap (threshold for disclosure per AMFI/CIR/2023-08). Identified pairs: (1) Bluechip + Large Cap: 72%, (2) Midcap + Flexicap: 61%. Requires Compliance Officer attestation before submission.

title: Large Redemption — ₹47.2 L from Ascend Equity Fund
description: Investor Suresh Mohan has requested full redemption of ₹47.2 L from Ascend Equity Fund. AI flagged for human review due to large value threshold.
aiProposal: Flag for manual review — redemption exceeds ₹25 L auto-approve threshold. Verify investor intent and ensure no distress signal.
rationale: Amount ₹47.2 L exceeds the ₹25 L auto-approve limit defined in autonomy envelope. No prior large redemption history. Investor has been receiving monthly dividend payouts — full redemption is unusual. Recommend calling investor before processing to confirm intent.
overrideReason: Investor called — confirmed it is estate planning related. Requested hold for 5 business days while legal documentation is prepared. Not a distress situation. Redemption rejected and rescheduled.

title: NRI Onboarding Rejected — FEMA Non-Compliance
description: NRI investor attempted onboarding using NRO account without required NRE account for SIP investments from abroad. Rejected for FEMA non-compliance.
aiProposal: Reject onboarding — NRI investor must use NRE or FCNR account for mutual fund investments per FEMA 1999. NRO account provided is non-compliant.
rationale: NRI investors must route mutual fund investments through NRE or FCNR accounts (FEMA 1999 Regulation 5). Investor provided NRO account (non-repatriable). This is a clear regulatory violation — cannot onboard. Standard rejection with guidance to open NRE account.
overrideReason: AI recommendation accepted. Rejection processed. Investor notified with guidance to open NRE account.

title: Distress Signal — Urgent Full Portfolio Liquidation
description: Investor Lakshmi Chandran called requesting same-day liquidation of entire portfolio (₹1.28 Cr). Unusual urgency flagged by servicing AI as potential distress or fraud signal.
aiProposal: Escalate to Risk Team — same-day liquidation of ₹1.28 Cr across 6 funds with no prior notice is an unusual high-risk pattern. Senior relationship manager to call investor before any processing.
rationale: Total portfolio: ₹1.28 Cr across 6 schemes. Request for same-day settlement is technically impossible for equity funds (T+3). However, the urgency pattern and large amount require verification. Potential risk: account takeover fraud, financial distress, or legal hold situation. Senior RM intervention required.
overrideReason: Escalated to Senior RM and Risk Head. Account flagged for monitoring. RM will call investor within 1 hour.

title: Risk Profile Update — Changed to Aggressive
description: Existing investor Ananya Krishnan has requested change in risk profile from 'Conservative' to 'Aggressive' after completing financial literacy module.
aiProposal: Approve risk profile change — investor has completed AMFI-mandated financial literacy assessment, score 82/100 (threshold: 60).
rationale: Risk profile change requires: (1) Fresh risk assessment score, (2) AMFI financial literacy module completion. Investor completed module on June 14, score 82/100 (pass threshold: 60). Profile change is investor's right per SEBI regulations. Current SIP in Conservative fund — recommend offering switch to aligned funds.
evidence: Risk change: Investor right per SEBI

title: SEBI Inspection — Data Request Response
description: SEBI has issued a formal data request as part of thematic inspection on investor grievance redressal. AI has compiled requested data but response requires Board-level sign-off.
aiProposal: Escalate to Compliance Head and Board Secretary — SEBI inspection response requires Board resolution per SEBI (MF) Regulations 1996.
rationale: SEBI thematic inspection notice received June 14. Requested data: 24-month grievance log, resolution TAT data, escalation matrix. Data compiled and verified. Response requires Board resolution per SEBI (MF) Regulation 77. Cannot be approved at ops level.
overrideReason: Escalated to Compliance Head (Vikram Nair) and MD/CEO. Board Secretary notified for emergency resolution. Legal team looped in.
